hero_subtitle_1: A marketplace connecting you directly with Algerian artisans who craft authentic treasures with love
hero_subtitle_2: Discover independent artisans sharing their heritage—each piece tells a story of generations
hero_subtitle_3: The platform where artisans showcase their craft and the diaspora finds a connection to home
hero_title: Find the perfect handmade products for you
hero_subtitle: A platform to connect artisans with their customers
story_para1: For millions of Algerians living abroad, the longing for home goes beyond memories—it's in the textures, patterns, and craftsmanship that defined their childhoods.
story_para2: is the marketplace that bridges this gap. We empower artisans from Algeria to showcase and sell their authentic handcrafted creations directly to you.
story_para3: When you buy on Maker, you're not buying from us—you're supporting an artisan family directly, preserving traditions, and keeping our heritage alive for the next generation.
story_card_desc: Independent artisans from across Algeria running their own shops
categories_subtitle: Each category represents centuries of inherited skill, passed down through generations
category_pottery_desc: Traditional clay work from Kabylie and beyond
category_textiles_desc: Handwoven carpets, blankets, and traditional fabrics
seller_subtitle: Join Maker as a founding seller. Share your traditional Algerian craftsmanship with customers worldwide.
benefit1_desc: Create your personalized storefront and showcase your craftsmanship to the world.
benefit2_desc: Connect with Algerians abroad and international buyers who love authentic handmade items.
benefit3_desc: Set your own prices and keep the majority of your earnings. No hidden fees.
benefit4_desc: Simple dashboard to manage orders, track shipments, and communicate with customers.
benefit5_desc: Get paid safely and on time. We handle payment processing so you can focus on creating.
benefit6_desc: Analytics and insights to help you understand your customers and grow your sales.
seller_cta_title: Ready to Share Your Art with the World?
seller_cta_subtitle: Whether you weave carpets, craft pottery, forge silver jewelry, or create traditional clothing— there's a place for your talent on Maker.
seller_cta_footer: No monthly fees • Quick setup • Support in Arabic, French & English
trust_worldwide_desc: Artisans ship directly to you, anywhere in the world
trust_verified_desc: Every artisan is vetted for authenticity and quality
trust_direct_desc: 100% of your payment goes to the artisan (minus platform fees)
trust_secure_desc: Safe payments and buyer protection on every order
cta_subtitle: Whether you're looking to buy authentic crafts or sell your own creations, Maker connects the Algerian community worldwide
